name: Keyfactor
description: Keyfactor — machine identity management and PKI-as-a-service for certificates and cryptographic keys.

seo.title: Keyfactor — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Keyfactor: Keyfactor — machine identity management and PKI-as-a-service for certificates and cryptographic keys.

when_to_use: PKI-as-a-service for enterprise TLS certificate automation
Machine identity lifecycle management at DevOps scale
Certificate expiry alerting and auto-renewal orchestration
SSH key governance for privileged access management
EJBCA integration for on-premise PKI modernization

pros: Command, EJBCA, and SignServer in one portfolio
cons: Feature breadth can overwhelm small teams
review.verdict: A complete machine identity stack for enterprises; too much tool for a typical startup.
review.best_for: Enterprises managing certs, keys, and signing at scale with compliance needs.
review.not_for: Small teams whose PKI needs end at Let's Encrypt.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
